channel.title: Recipe Ideas from dinnerrecipes.github.io/idea
channel.description: A collection of delicious recipe ideas.

item.title: Unbelievable Low Fat Corned Beef Hash Recipe
item.description: The most delicious Low Fat Corned Beef Hash Recipe you'll ever taste is just one click away. Perfect for a weekend treat! Don't miss out on this recipe. #weekendvibes #treatyourself #indulge #bakingday #sweettreats

item.title: Viral Healthy Recipes With Ground Beef Dinner
item.description: This 5-ingredient Healthy Recipes With Ground Beef Dinner recipe is a lifesaver on busy days. Quick, simple, and oh-so-good. Save this pin for later! #5ingredients #quickandeasy #busymom #mealplan #simplerecipes

item.title: Amazing Beef Ribs Recipe Bbq Sauce
item.description: The ultimate guide to making the perfect Beef Ribs Recipe Bbq Sauce from scratch. It's easier than you think! Visit our website to become a pro. #fromscratch #bakinglove #cookingfromscratch #diyfood #kitchenskills

item.title: Foolproof Recipe For Beef Chilli Dry
item.description: Don't know what to cook today? Try this special Recipe For Beef Chilli Dry recipe and impress everyone. Click the link for cooking instructions.

item.title: Surprising Corned Beef Hash Recipe Shredded Potatoes
item.description: Don't know what to cook today? Try this special Corned Beef Hash Recipe Shredded Potatoes recipe and impress everyone. Click the link for cooking instructions.
